name: Variable Temperature Electric Kettle
description: 1.7L cordless electric kettle with 6 preset temperatures, keep-warm function, and gooseneck pour option.

reviews.title: Perfect for pour-over coffee and tea
reviews.reviewText: Being able to choose the exact temperature for different teas and pour-over coffee is a game changer. Heats quickly and the keep-warm function is genuinely useful. Looks great on the counter.

reviews.title: Great quality variable kettle
reviews.reviewText: Solid stainless interior and the temperature presets are accurate when tested. Boils fast and looks sleek. The display is easy to read. One minor thing: the lid mechanism requires a firm press.

reviews.title: Worth every penny
reviews.reviewText: The variable temperature control has made my green tea noticeably better since boiling water was ruining the delicate leaves. Very clean design and simple to operate. Highly recommended.
